ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the security (e.g., EQ for equity) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the security */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector classification of the security (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "company_profile" TEXT /* Brief overview of the listed company */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the security was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security being traded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the security at the start of the trading session */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the trading session */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the trading session */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the security at the end of the trading session */,
  "last" REAL /* Last traded price of the security */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous closing price of the security */,
  "tot_trd_qty" INTEGER /* Total quantity traded during the session */,
  "tot_trd_val" REAL /* Total value of trades conducted during the session */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed during the session */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the session_id in trading_sessions */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total number of shares traded during the session */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security at the end of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, volume spike) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active/inactive) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-platform) */,
  "notification_status" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been sent to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the exchange_id in exchanges */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user conducting the transaction */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade being executed */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of security transacted */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trading_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session the report pertains to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily summary, anomaly detection) */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the report (e.g., summary, analysis) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  "data_feed_url" TEXT /* URL for the data feed */,
  "data_source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "data_update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of exchange (e.g., stock, commodity, derivatives) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_securities" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the exchange_id in exchanges */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the security_id in securities */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the security was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id", "security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role_id in user_roles */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permission_id in permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view market data, execute trades) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
